titleStmt.title: SII 23.151: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 151. (A.R. No. 151 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Śiva temple—on the north wall of the Bhairava shrine Achyutarāya: Śaka 1454 (1532-33 A.D.) Khara, Tai, 8.

summary.p: This is damaged and seems to record a grant of tax free land to the temple of Tiruppūvālaikkuḍi-uḍaiya-Nāyanār of Vaḍapaṟṟu by the Ūravar of the Paṟṟu. Reference is made to the checking of the revenue accounts by one Śemma-Nāyakkar who was having his camp at Tirupputtūr, and to the default in payment of the iṟai on the part of a land-owner by name Piḷḷaimalai-Nāḍāḻvār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī manmakaā makāmaṇṭalicuran Ariya Irāyavipāṭaṉ muvarāyakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu
koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ pūṟuvatekkaṇa paccimauttara camuttirāti pati Irācairācaṉ Irācātirā
caṉ Irācaparamecuraṉ śrī virappiṟatāpa Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya mārāya Accuttarāyaṟku cel
lāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 4 ṉmel cellāniṉṟa kaṟavaruṣam taimātam 8- tiyati poṉṉamarāpati
nāṭṭu vaṭapaṟṟu tiruppūvālaikkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruttoṭṭam Āticaṇṭecuratevaka
nmikoyiṟ kaṇakkaṟku Innāṭṭu Ippaṟṟu matiyā vum yinta Ūrava rom kāṇiāc
ci yiṟaiyāṟṟāyiṟaiyili tevatāṉamākap piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu cemma
nāyakkarum tirupputtūrile Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Eṅkaḷ Ūrukkuk kaṭamai kāṇikkai Eriyil
pūṭṭukaiyiṉālum Eṅkaḷukkum yinta mutal yiṟukka Ekapokakuṭiyil tamum Ūrile Eṅkaḷur k kāṇi
yāḷaṉ piḷḷaimalai nāṭāḻvār Uḷḷiṭṭār yiṟaiyāṟṟāmal paṟṟi nāṭ kuṭiyil pokkupaṭṭār
m poṟukkai yilakkam yiṟukkaiyāṟṟātapaṭi Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṭciyāṉa paḷavayalppaṟṟukkup perunāṉkel
laiyaāvaṉa kiḻpāṟkkellai Iṉṉayiṉār tevatāṉap puṟavukkum cuṅkat til puravukkum meṟkum
The rest of the inscription consisting of 5 or 6 lines is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
